meta.tagline: Financing the digital future of Uzbekistan
meta.description: IT Park Capital — targeted loans for IT companies, the Zero Risk programme, the Bilgi marketplace, and M&A advisory. The financial institution supporting Uzbekistan's IT sector.
meta.ogTitle: IT Park Capital — Financial solutions for the IT sector
meta.ogDescription: Financing, expert support, and growth tools for IT companies expanding into international markets.

nav.menuFeaturedBody: Our specialist will analyse your business and recommend the right tool within 1 business day.

hero.title: Financing the digital future of Uzbekistan
hero.subtitle: Access financing and scaling tools to grow your IT company and expand into international markets.

programs.sectionSubtitle: Loans, government programmes, and advisory for IT companies at every stage.

it-companies.title: Targeted loan for IT companies and educational projects
it-companies.summary: Scaling educational centres and IT companies, opening new branches, and expanding teams.

it-export.title: Targeted loan for IT service exporters
it-export.summary: Fulfilling export contract obligations, covering operating expenses, bridging cash flow gaps.

corporate-education.title: Targeted loan for corporate education of employees
corporate-education.summary: Upskilling IT company employees and creating new jobs.

zero-risk.title: Zero Risk Programme
zero-risk.summary: Attracting IT and BPO companies to Uzbekistan — with offices, equipment, and subsidies.

bilgi.title: Bilgi Marketplace
bilgi.summary: 100+ training centres, 520+ IT courses, and instalment plans for ages 16–35.

ma-advisory.title: M&A and financial advisory
ma-advisory.summary: End-to-end support for IT companies on mergers and acquisitions.

results.sectionSubtitle: Real businesses, real outcomes — through the IT Park Capital ecosystem.

about.sectionTitle: Financial support for the IT sector
about.lead: IT Park Capital is the financial institution supporting Uzbekistan's IT sector.
about.missionTitle: A sustainable ecosystem for IT company growth
about.pillarsSubtitle: Our work spans three directions — within a single ecosystem.
about.timelineSubtitle: From an education hub to a financial institution.

cta.title: Ready to find a tailored solution?
cta.subtitle: We'll review your situation and recommend the right financial instrument.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heroTitle: Tell us about your company — we will find the right tool for you
contact.subtitle: Write to us or get in touch directly. We reply within 1 business day.
contact.methodEmailSub: Anytime — we reply same business day
contact.expectSubtitle: A clear, simple, and quick process.
contact.expect1Body: Tell us briefly about your business via the form or email.
contact.expect2Body: Our specialist studies your situation and recommends the right programme.
contact.expect3Body: We schedule a convenient time and discuss detailed terms.
